steps.title: Find the shared input $c$
steps.content: Since $p$ has slope $8$, write $p(x)=8x+b$. Use $p(4)=38$: $$8(4)+b=38,$$ so $b=6$. Then solve $p(c)=-2$: $$8c+6=-2,$$ so $c=-1$.

steps.title: Fit the line for $t$
steps.content: Now $t(c)=-3$ means $t(-1)=-3$, and the other point is $t(5)=51$. Enter $x_1=[-1,5]$ and $y_1=[-3,51]$, then type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=9$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The slope of $y=t(x)$ is $9$, which matches choice D. By hand, $\dfrac{51-(-3)}{5-(-1)}=\dfrac{54}{6}=9$.
